phrases.intent_en: Where can I pay for parking?
phrases.cultural_note: Parking meters along the 'Dijk' are typical for Dutch harbor areas.

likely_response.local: Bij de meters aan de Dijk.
likely_response.translation_en: At the meters along the waterfront.

responses.english: At the meters along the waterfront.
responses.local: Bij de meters aan de Dijk.
